sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77163" key="pamye/ktwr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παμ-ψέκτωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n77163.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one that blames all</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2583.tlg001:58" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">58</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
